command_failures.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail

queue=(\"dir:crates/orbit-engine/src\")
seen_dirs=\"\"

process_file() {
  local file_sel=\""'$1"
  local file_input
  file_input=$(jq -nc --arg s "$file_sel" '"'{selectors:["'$s], summary:false}'"')
  local file_pack
  file_pack="'$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$file_input")

  local sym_input
  sym_input=$(printf "%s" "$file_pack" | jq -c '"'{selectors:[.entries[0].symbol_summary[]? | select(.kind==\"function\" or .kind==\"method\") | .selector], summary:false}')

  local count
  count="'$(printf "%s" "$sym_input" | jq '"'.selectors | length')
  if [ \""'$count" -eq 0 ]; then
    return
  fi

  local sym_pack
  sym_pack=$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$sym_input")
  printf "%s'"\\n\" \""'$sym_pack" | jq -r '"'.entries[] | select(((.source // \"\") | contains(\".run_deterministic(\"))) | [.selector, .name] | @tsv'
}

while [ "'${#queue[@]} -gt 0 ]; do
  dir_sel="${queue[0]}"
  queue=("${queue[@]:1}")

  # simple seen-set check using newline delimiters
  case "'"\\n"'$seen_dirs'"\\n\" in
    *\"\\n"'$dir_sel'"\\n\"*) continue ;;
  esac
  seen_dirs=\""'$seen_dirs'"\\n"'$dir_sel"

  dir_input=$(jq -nc --arg s "$dir_sel" '"'{selectors:["'$s], summary:false}'"')
  dir_pack="'$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$dir_input")

  mapfile -t children < <(printf "%s" "$dir_pack" | jq -r '"'.entries[0].children[]?')
  for child in \""'${children[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$child" == dir:* ]]; then
      queue+=("$child")
    elif [[ "$child" == file:* ]] && [[ "$child" == *.rs ]]; then
      if [[ "$child" == *"/tests/"* ]]; then
        continue
      fi
      process_file "$child"
    fi
  done

done
'"'"

command_failures.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -eu
set -o pipefail

queue=("dir:crates/orbit-engine/src")
seen_dirs=$'"'\\n'

process_file() {
  local file_sel=\""'$1"
  local file_input
  file_input=$(jq -nc --arg s "$file_sel" '"'{selectors:["'$s], summary:false}'"')
  local file_pack
  file_pack="'$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$file_input")

  local sym_input
  sym_input=$(print -r -- "$file_pack" | jq -c '"'{selectors:[.entries[0].symbol_summary[]? | select(.kind==\"function\" or .kind==\"method\") | .selector], summary:false}')

  local count
  count="'$(print -r -- "$sym_input" | jq '"'.selectors | length')
  if [ \""'$count" -eq 0 ]; then
    return
  fi

  local sym_pack
  sym_pack=$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$sym_input")
  print -r -- "$sym_pack" | jq -r '"'.entries[] | select(((.source // \"\") | contains(\".run_deterministic(\"))) | [.selector, .name] | @tsv'
}

iter=0
while [ "'${#queue[@]} -gt 0 ]; do
  iter=$((iter+1))
  if [ "$iter" -gt 2 ]; then
    break
  fi

  dir_sel="$queue[1]"
  queue=($queue[2,-1])

  case "$seen_dirs" in
    *$'"'\\n'\""'$dir_sel"$'"'\\n'*) continue ;;
  esac
  seen_dirs+=\""'$dir_sel"$'"'\\n'

  dir_input="'$(jq -nc --arg s "$dir_sel" '"'{selectors:["'$s], summary:false}'"')
  dir_pack="'$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$dir_input")

  children=("${(@f)$(print -r -- "$dir_pack" | jq -r '"'.entries[0].children[]?')}\")

  for child in "'$children; do
    if [[ "$child" == dir:* ]]; then
      queue+=("$child")
    elif [[ "$child" == file:* ]] && [[ "$child" == *.rs ]]; then
      if [[ "$child" == *"/tests/"* ]]; then
        continue
      fi
      process_file "$child"
    fi
  done
done
'
